name: TextField
purpose: Captures a short text value with built-in labeling, help, error, and accessory support.
whenToUse: Use for single-line text entry where a label and helper text should stay visually consistent.
Use when forms need built-in focus, disabled, and error styling tied to semantic tokens.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for long-form input or rich text.
Do not place ad hoc validation visuals around TextField; use its errorMessage and helperText API.
accessibilityRequirements: Always provide a visible label or accessibilityLabel.
Expose validation messages through text that assistive technologies can announce.
Do not rely on placeholder text as the only field description.
Append required meaning through copy or accessibilityLabel instead of color alone.
